"'''Run Mace Run'''" is a 20-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story featured in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 2]]''. It was written and drawn by the [[Fillbach Brothers]], colored by [[Wil Glass]], and lettered by [[Michael David Thomas]].

==Plot summary==
On the planet [[Omphalos]],<ref name="SWTCC">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' {{C|p.45}}</ref> [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] is shot down, and with his [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] dead, he runs to disable the prototype [[Planet Killer]] before its creators can show it to [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].
